notes: Reproduced: SkiaSharp 2.88.3 Blazor WASM app fails at runtime with TypeInitializationException for SKImageInfo when WasmBuildNative is enabled (simulating publish/deployment). The canvas renders blank with no SkiaSharp output. SkiaSharp 3.119.2 resolves this — it ships per-TFM emscripten-matched static libraries (3.1.34 for net8.0) and auto-sets WasmBuildNative=true, rendering correctly. The 2.88.x line lacked proper .NET 8 WASM native library support.

reproductionSteps.description: Create .NET 8 Blazor WASM project and add SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 2.88.3 with WasmBuildNative=true
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new blazorwasm -n Repro --framework net8.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor --version 2.88.3

reproductionSteps.description: Serve the WASM app and verify runtime behavior — canvas fails with TypeInitializationException
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet run --urls http://localhost:5111 --no-build # then navigate with Playwright browser
reproductionSteps.output: Server started on http://localhost:5111. Navigated with Playwright. Browser console error: "Error: The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo' threw an exception. at kr (dotnet.runtime.8.0.24.js:3:35541) at invokeDotNetMethod (blazor.webassembly.js:1:3503) at unknown (SKHtmlCanvas.js:104:50)". Canvas area visible as empty white rectangle — no 'SkiaSharp' text rendered. No 'SUCCESS: rendered' message in console.

versionResults.notes: TypeInitializationException for SKImageInfo at runtime. Build succeeds but canvas fails to render. SkiaSharp 2.88.3 does not ship emscripten-matched .a files for .NET 8.

Canvas renders correctly with 'SkiaSharp' text. No console errors. SUCCESS: rendered 298x298 logged. SkiaSharp 3.119.2 ships per-TFM emscripten static libraries (3.1.34 for net8.0) and auto-sets WasmBuildNative=true.

errorMessages.primaryError: TypeInitializationException: The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo' threw an exception — native WASM binary fails to initialize when linked with WasmBuildNative=true on .NET 8
errorMessages.stackTrace:
Error: The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo' threw an exception.
    at kr (dotnet.runtime.8.0.24.js:3:35541)
    at unknown (dotnet.runtime.8.0.24.js:3:181099)
    at invokeDotNetMethod (blazor.webassembly.js:1:3503)
    at unknown (SKHtmlCanvas.js:104:50)

corrections.corrected: TypeInitializationException for SKImageInfo — the MONO AOT error in the issue is from Azure deployment; local reproduction with WasmBuildNative=true surfaces the same root cause as a TypeInitializationException

proposedResponse.body:
Thanks for reporting this! We were able to reproduce the issue with SkiaSharp 2.88.3 on .NET 8 Blazor WASM.

When `WasmBuildNative` is enabled (which is what happens during publish/deployment), the app fails at runtime with:

```
TypeInitializationException: The type initializer for 'SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo' threw an exception.
```

The canvas renders blank — matching the behavior you described (works in debugger, fails when deployed). This is because SkiaSharp 2.88.3 did not ship WASM static libraries (.a files) compiled with an emscripten version matched to .NET 8's WASM toolchain.

The good news is that this is fixed in SkiaSharp 3.x. Could you try upgrading?

**Tested versions:**
| Version | Result |
|---------|--------|
| 2.88.3 | ❌ Reproduced — TypeInitializationException at runtime |
| 3.119.2 | ✅ Fixed — canvas renders correctly |

**Workaround:** Upgrade to SkiaSharp 3.119.2 (or later). Version 3.x includes per-TFM emscripten version mapping and automatically sets `WasmBuildNative=true`. Note that some APIs have changed between 2.88.x and 3.x (e.g., `SKPaint.TextSize` → `SKFont.Size`), so review the migration guide for details.

actionability.reason: Bug reproduced on reporter's version (2.88.3) but fully fixed in latest stable (3.119.2). SkiaSharp 3.x includes per-TFM emscripten version mapping that directly addresses the WASM native linking failure. The 2.88.x line is EOL.

workarounds: Upgrade to SkiaSharp 3.119.2 or later, which includes per-TFM emscripten version mapping and proper .NET 8 WASM support

actions.description: Close as fixed in SkiaSharp 3.119.2 — reporter should upgrade from 2.88.3
